summary: Roster Page Redesign Testing Complete - All 12 backend tests PASSED, all 11 frontend UI tests PASSED. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: RosterPage.js: Clean implementation with ViewSwitcher, NeedsAttentionBanner, GroupCard, AthleteRow components
ReassignModal: Properly integrated with coach select dropdown and reason input, calls POST /api/athletes/{id}/reassign
All data-testid attributes properly placed for testing (roster-page, roster-search, view-tab-*, roster-athlete-*, etc.)
MomentumBadge, StageBadge, ActivityLabel components display enriched athlete data correctly
Search filter works across name, position, and team fields
seed_data_creation: None - used existing ATHLETES data from mock_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Roster page redesign fully verified. Backend /api/roster returns enriched data (teamGroups, ageGroups, needsAttention, summary with 25 athletes/3 teams/7 coaches). Frontend has 3 view modes (Team/Coach/Age), needs attention banner with 12 items, search filter, hover quick actions (Open/Assign/Notes), and reassign modal.

needs_attention_banner.details: Shows 12 items at top, 'Show all 12' expands to show all, athletes with names and why they need attention

team_view_default.details: Team View active by default, shows U16 Elite (5), U17 Premier (10), U18 Academy (10)

athlete_row_data.details: Each row shows: Name, Momentum badge (score + trend), Stage badge (Exploring/Recruiting/Narrowing), Position, Grad year, Coach name, Last activity

hover_quick_actions.details: Open, Assign, Notes buttons appear on hover

coach_view.details: Coach View shows athletes grouped by coach (7 groups)

age_group_view.details: Age Group View shows Class of 2025 (10), Class of 2026 (10), Class of 2027 (5)

search_filter.details: Typing 'Sarah' filters to 1 result, clearing search shows all 25 athletes

reassign_modal.details: Assign button opens modal with coach select dropdown and reason input

backend_api_roster.details: Returns teamGroups, ageGroups, needsAttention, athletes with momentum_score/momentum_trend/days_since_activity/recruiting_stage
